title: Best States for Lower Utility Bills in 2026
summary: A side-by-side breakdown of electricity, natural gas, and water-cost trends by state to help movers identify lower monthly utility burdens.
target_audience: Households planning a move within 6 months
social_hook: Trying to cut monthly bills before you move?
cta: See which states currently trend lower for utility spend.

title: Property Tax Hotspots to Avoid Overpaying
summary: Highlights counties where property-tax burdens are rising fastest and explains how to compare effective rates before buying.
social_hook: House hunting this quarter? Check taxes before signing.
cta: Use county-level tax pages to pressure-test your budget.

title: How to Compare Insurance Costs Before Relocating
summary: Framework for evaluating insurance premiums by state and city, plus simple ranges to estimate annual variance.
target_audience: Families balancing housing and insurance budgets
social_hook: Insurance can erase a cheaper mortgage fast.
cta: Compare insurance variance before choosing a city.
